per_session_multiplier.label: pr90_ksweep_baseline
per_session_multiplier.source: research/walltps_ab/mtp_k*/paired_ab.json arms.baseline (PR #90 K=7, N=3) -- LOCKED reference 454.338

notes: Multiplier = 481.53 (official, single anchor PR#52) / 454.194 (local mean wall_tps, n_runs=9 over 3 committed sessions) = 1.06019.
Per-session multiplier spans [1.05985, 1.06044] (incl. corroborating sessions) -- denominator is config-stable to +/-0.028%.

Local-side CI is tight (many sessions). DOMINANT honest uncertainty is the single official anchor: its run-to-run variance is UNMEASURED; the envelope assumes official per-run CV=1.00% as a sensitivity knob.

Config-stability holds within the spec-frontier family (K/MBT sweeps); cross-precision invariance is untested (older rungs used a different local meter) but is not the binding axis for the tree (same precision as anchor).

eps_decomposition.verify_gemm_role: lever target (its transfer sets the reference, not eps)
eps_decomposition.order: second-order in s (eps -> 0 as s -> 0; |eps| = s*phi_vg*|m/m_vg - 1|)

tau_eff.util_gap_reason: achieved-HBM-util gap (77.1%) is wave-quantization set by SM count -> identical on two sm_86 A10G boxes; util is dimensionless so closing it multiplies achieved BW by (1+s) regardless of peak_BW
tau_eff.tile_cliff_note: tree-free path stays at M=8 (E[T]=3.844, NOT widened); the M=33 Marlin tile cliff is irrelevant to this path
tau_eff.unpinnable_residual: split-K reduction SYNC OVERHEAD is mildly absolute-BW-sensitive (IBM A100 PCIe-vs-SXM caution); could under-realize s by a small relative haircut local data cannot measure -> the named job of the ONE official anchor

tau_roofline.method: tau = tau_eff * tau_mix; tau_mix from EXACT slice-mix over denken #97/#105 decode budget under bounding tail-transfer hypotheses; tau_eff from the BW-utilisation roofline (peak_BW cancels in the local/official ratio). Replaces bound_tau_local's asserted 0.99 with a derived second-order floor.

roofline_ship_gate.verdict_label: roofline derives tau = [0.9983, 1.00] (eps well-bounded, second-order); the conservative corner clears 500 at ubel-central SplitK on the derived floor ALONE -> tree-free 500 shippable on theory + ubel's number; the official shot is OPTIONAL confirmation, not a gate
reasons: derived floor 0.9983 vs asserted 0.99 -> conservative threshold 5.84% <= ubel-central 8.5% (margin +2.66pp)
residual (NOT a tau problem): ubel-LOW 5% does not clear even at tau=1.00 (thr 5.49%) -> a SplitK-delivery question for ubel #108, not the transfer factor
residual (anchor-confirmed, not a gate): tau_eff sync-overhead haircut up to 1.26% relative still clears ubel-central -> the one official shot confirms it + banks the 2nd pair

preregistered_anchor.purpose: ONE pre-registered official anchor; one shot, three deliverables
preregistered_anchor.launch_policy: SEPARATE human-approved request (program.md); this is the SPEC only

run_config.submission: ubel #108 SplitK W4A16 verify-GEMM tree-free stack (M=8 linear, E[T]=3.844)
preconditions: ubel #108 SplitK BUILT + local 0-flip greedy self-consistency (kanna #114)
remote package complete (MODEL_ID Hub-resolvable, kernels uploaded)

lockstep_local_meter.what: the SAME SplitK submission's local wall_tps, #72/#82 median-of-N=3 protocol
lockstep_local_meter.why: banks the long-missing SECOND matched (official, local) pair -> unblocks the data-path tau that #112 found blocked (1 pair, 7.1% meter confound)

go_hold_threshold.GO: official tps >= 500 AND ppl <= 2.42 -> ship as the new frontier (>481.53)
go_hold_threshold.HOLD: official tps < 500 -> do NOT ship; the run STILL banks the pair + transfer constant (a valuable negative that prices the next lever)

prices_future_levers_without_a_shot: denken #113 LUT-GEMM (same verify-GEMM HBM-traffic class -> same tau_eff)
banked_transfer_constant.mechanism: all are bandwidth levers on the same BW-bound verify-GEMM; tau_eff is a property of the roofline class, not the specific kernel

three_deliverables: the 2nd matched (official, local) pair (unblocks the data path)
greedy self-consistency on the official gate (kanna #114)

lawine_112_instrument.finding: data-path blocked: 1 matched (official,local) pair, 7.1% meter confound
lawine_112_instrument.gate: AMBER -- ONE official SplitK anchor to confirm tau>=0.99

denken_109_corner.finding: corner falls back to GENERIC tau=0.96 -> straddles 500 at ubel ~8.5%

lawine_116_roofline.finding: eps second-order in s, |eps|<0.4% even with adversarial tail; tau_eff=1.0 robust (BW-bound official + arch-invariant util gap); split-K sync-overhead the only un-pinnable residual
lawine_116_roofline.gate: GREEN at ubel-central -> the official shot is CONFIRMATION, not a gate

fleet_consolidation.consolidated: the roofline REPLACES #112's asserted 0.99 with a derived ~0.998 and REMOVES #109's generic-0.96 fallback (the bandwidth lever's transfer is NOT a generic config change). tau is no longer the binding ship constraint; the residual is ubel's SplitK delivery + a small tau_eff haircut the one anchor confirms.

preregistered_anchor.why_optional_not_gate: roofline derives tau = [0.9983, 1.00] (eps well-bounded, second-order); the conservative corner clears 500 at ubel-central SplitK on the derived floor ALONE -> tree-free 500 shippable on theory + ubel's number; the official shot is OPTIONAL confirmation, not a gate
